questionHtml: Outline evidence for evolution from the limbs of mammals such as pangolins.
markschemeHtml:
1. pentadactyl;
  2. homologous with limbs of other vertebrates;
  3. due to common ancestry;
  4. adaptation;

meta.title: Outline evidence for evolution from the limbs of mammals such as pangolins.
breadcrumbLabels: A4.1.4. Evidence for evolution from homologous structures
